situation: audit-2026-07-01-004 finding L-001 (priority 4/5): test_text_output_has_recommendation_section only asserted string presence ('推荐工作单位' in stdout and '#1' in stdout), allowing degenerate implementations to pass — e.g. printing '#1' in explanatory text rather than a structured recommendation line. No validation of rank continuity, score format, or reason non-emptiness.
action: Replaced weak string-presence assertions with regex-based format validation. Added module-level _REC_LINE_RE pattern matching `^  #(\d+)\s+(\S+)\s+\(score=([\d.]+)\)\s+—\s+(.+)$`. New test asserts: at least one conformant #N line exists; ranks start at 1 and increment contiguously; scores are non-negative floats; reasons are non-empty. Updated module docstring bullet #4 to reflect strengthened contract. Added `import re`.
